text:
Done.

- Added the noindex application portal route at app/freelance.
- Verification: npm run build passed and curl -I https://www.samzamor.com/freelance returned 200 with x-robots-tag noindex.
- Next: send me the next job URL and I will generate the package.
You should consider improving your resume and applying to jobs that match your background. There are many opportunities available if you keep trying.
Done. Verification passed and everything works. Next: ship it.
